description: Create a Bridge Command scenario named 'w) Miami IALA B Approach' that simulates the entrance to Miami Government Cut following IALA Region B rules (Red Right Returning). Configure the scenario files in '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/w) Miami IALA B Approach/' including environment.ini, ownship.ini, and othership.ini. The vessel 'MV Dorado' should be positioned at Lat 25.766 N, Long 80.080 W, Heading 270 (Westbound), and Speed 10 knots. The channel must consist of 3 pairs of lateral buoys (6 total) extending Westward with gates at Longitudes 80.100 W, 80.110 W, and 80.120 W, and a width of approximately 200m (North buoys at ~25.767 N, South buoys at ~25.765 N). Assign the correct buoy models (Red/Green) to the North and South sides according to IALA Region B rules for a Westbound vessel entering from sea. Document the buoy model names used for the North and South sides in '/home/ga/Documents/channel_configuration_plan.txt'.
